hero.title: Your Vote,
hero.subtitle: Anywhere in the World
hero.description: Secure, transparent voting for 7.5+ million Non‑Resident Nepalis. Powered by blockchain, protected by biometrics.

features.title: Features
features.heading: Why Choose
features.subheading: Built with cutting-edge technology to ensure your vote is secure, private, and counted
features.biometricDesc: Face verification ensures one person, one vote — eliminating fraud and impersonation.
features.coercionDesc: Live camera detection prevents forced voting. Your vote stays yours.
features.globalDesc: All you need is a browser and internet connection. Vote from any country.
features.trackerDesc: See what your leaders are actually doing. Informed votes lead to better governance.
features.nrnDesc: Give 7.5+ million Nepalis a voice in Nepal's future.
features.blockchainDesc: Votes are recorded immutably. Transparent, auditable elections you can trust.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Your Journey to
howItWorks.subheading: Four simple steps to cast your vote securely from anywhere
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account with NRN ID and email verification
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete face verification to confirm your identity
howItWorks.step3Desc: Vote securely with live camera protection against coercion
howItWorks.step4Desc: View transparent, real-time results on the blockchain

cta.title: Ready to Make Your Voice Heard?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of NRNs voting securely from anywhere in the world.

footer.description: Secure blockchain voting for Non-Resident Nepalis. Built with ❤️ for Nepal.
